category_sources: Official homepage describes mp3fs as a read-only FUSE filesystem for transcoding audio to MP3: https://khenriks.github.io/mp3fs/
source_facts.description: Read-only FUSE file system: transcodes audio formats to MP3
docs_sources: Official homepage includes usage and points to README/source and manpage: https://khenriks.github.io/mp3fs/
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/khenriks/mp3fs; per instruction, repo was not re-evaluated
tags_sources: Official homepage says mp3fs transcodes FLAC to MP3 on the fly: https://khenriks.github.io/mp3fs/
source_facts.description identifies FUSE filesystem and MP3 transcoding
